title: Find Lucky Integer in an Array

testcases.input: arr = [2,2,3,4] Output: 2 Explanation: The only lucky number in the array is 2 because frequency[2] == 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The only lucky number in the array is 2 because frequency[2] == 2.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,2,3,3,3] Output: 3 Explanation: 1, 2 and 3 are all lucky numbers, return the largest of them.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: 1, 2 and 3 are all lucky numbers, return the largest of them.

testcases.input: arr = [2,2,2,3,3] Output: -1 Explanation: There are no lucky numbers in the array.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There are no lucky numbers in the array.
